jobs.title: Digital Marketing (Assistant) Manager / Marketing Engagement & Service
jobs.company: 台灣雀巢股份有限公司
jobs.desc: As the SEM / SEO / AIO / AEO Manager, you will be the search strategy expert and coach at Nestlé Taiwan. Your mission goes far beyond managing campaigns. You will: Define how search supports brand building and business performance across Nestlé Taiwan. Build search capability within Brand teams. Ensure agency partnerships deliver quality thinking, strong logic, and real impact. You will sit at the intersection of brands, agencies, data, and strategy—helping Nestlé stay ahead in a fast‑changing search landscape. Regarding the Role & Responsibilities, you will lead the way in shaping Nestlé's search direction by: - Defining search strategies that clearly support brand and business objectives - Coaching Brand Managers on: a. How to brief search agencies with strategic clarity b. How to review, question, and challenge agency recommendations—on keywords, budgets, and performance assumptions - Translating complex and technical search topics into simple, business‑focused guidance - Reviewing agency outputs through a strategic lens—ensuring best practices, sound reasoning, and business relevance (not just media KPIs) - Supporting informed decisions across the funnel, helping brands choose the right balance between SEO, SEM, and integrated search investment
